DESCRIPTION: Humans are diverse and adaptable, originating from countless worlds across fantasy and sci-fi civilizations. Highly versatile and resourceful.

Nectars: May purchase Nectars with starting frequency
Thorns: May choose Thorns to increase Frequency
DESCRIPTION: Infinite variations/mutations of humans for those who want to be different than baseline.
Graceful and long-lived, with enhanced magical affinity but reduced technological integration.
Hardy mountain dwellers with superior crafting abilities and enhanced durability.
Post-human evolved beings with advanced technological integration but reduced baseline attributes.
Half-demon hybrids with enhanced physical capabilities and inherent magical resistance.
Ancient bloodline with powerful heritage but requiring custom balancing for each character.
Brutal warrior-nomads with immense physical prowess but limited magical and technological aptitude.
Small folk with natural stealth abilities and remarkable luck in dire situations.
Scrappy survivors who excel in groups and make the most of discarded resources.
Planetouched beings with devilish heritage granting supernatural resilience and cunning.
Mortals touched by fey magic, existing partially between worlds with enhanced magical sensitivity.
Beings who have spent eons drifting through astral space, gaining cosmic perspective but losing grounding.
Silicon-based lifeforms with incredible durability but limited flexibility and mobility.
Natural polymorphs who can alter their appearance but struggle with consistent identity.
Beings who have transcended death through dark pacts or ancient curses.
Artificial beings created with advanced technology but limited emotional range.
Entities born in the spaces between realities, naturally resistant to cosmic forces.
Humanoids with elemental bloodlines granting natural magical affinity but environmental limitations.
Angelic beings operating in mortal realms with divine blessings but bound by celestial codes.
Demon-touched beings with infernal strength but unpredictable and destructive tendencies.
Telepathic beings with powerful mental abilities but vulnerability to psychic feedback.
Magical automatons with incredible durability and focus but limited emotional capacity.
Beings unstuck in time with knowledge of multiple timelines but unreliable temporal anchoring.
Entities who exist partially in the dream realm with enhanced imagination but weakened physical form.
Survivors of cosmic plagues with enhanced immune systems but perpetual infection risk.
Beings born in stellar nurseries with incredible cosmic attunement but dependence on stellar energy.
Cyborgs integrating organic and mechanical components with enhanced capabilities but technical dependencies.
Beings existing in quantum superposition with reality-bending abilities but unstable existence.
Warriors whose souls have been reforged in spiritual fires, granting power but fragmenting identity.
Reflections of other beings given independent existence with balanced abilities but derivative nature.
Cosmic bards who sing the songs of creation and destruction but risk madness from cosmic truths.
Beings with hearts of elemental fire granting immunity and power but constant heat requirements.
Arachnid beings capable of moving between dimensional phases but suffering spatial disconnection.
Beings who retain perfect memories of their lineage but suffer from information cascade overload.
Humanoids born during cosmic storms with electrical affinity but uncontrolled energy discharge.
Beings born in technological ruins with immunity to decay but corrosive effects on surroundings.
Nocturnal beings blessed by lunar forces with enhanced night abilities but daylight vulnerability.
Warriors bound by blood pacts granting regenerative abilities but compulsive bloodlust.
Beings of pure thought given physical form with incredible mental abilities but fragile bodies.
Beings adapted to variable gravity with enhanced spatial awareness but unstable physical density.
Collections of nanoscopic entities forming humanoid appearance with technological mastery but unstable cohesion.
Ghostly beings partially anchored to reality with phase abilities but vulnerable to physical disruption.
Crystalline beings who manipulate light and color but suffer from sensory overload in complex environments.
Beings scarred by stellar radiation with cosmic attunement but perpetual radiation damage.
Members of collective consciousness with shared knowledge but suppressed individual identity.
Beings touched by chaotic warp energies with reality manipulation but unpredictable mutations.
Beings who carry echoes of previous souls with ancestral wisdom but inherited psychological damage.
